title: Clean up historical release metadata
description: Restore missing changelog and appcast release-note metadata, recover available GitHub release assets from duplicate drafts, and verify the release inventory remains consistent.

title: Add unscoped ccusage backend
description: Implement a macOS-only unscoped ccusage local usage backend with pnx/pnpx/pnpm dlx runner fallback, preserving provider identity for future multi-agent UI while keeping native Claude parsing as fallback.

title: Reduce blog usage sync throttle
description: The passive blog usage sync currently waits about one hour between attempts. Reduce the throttle aggressively while keeping manual sync bypass behavior and tests aligned.

title: Add passive blog usage sync
description: Implement macOS-only passive sync from local Claude, Codex, and OpenCode usage sources into the blog usage ingest endpoint, with Keychain token storage, Settings controls, hourly throttle, and tests.
